libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No Docker image, external WebDAV server, environment variable, or system property appears necessary. Prefer in-memory XML/protocol object tests and lightweight mocks/stubs for servlet request and response objects; use javax.servlet APIs, not jakarta.servlet.

deterministic_setup.reason: The 2.0-beta4 POM inherits servlet-api 2.3 as a provided dependency; Gradle will not bring it transitively for tests, but classes such as AbstractWebdavServlet, InputContextImpl, OutputContextImpl, WebdavRequestImpl, and WebdavResponseImpl reference javax.servlet types.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8851 [Automation] native-image run fails for org.apache.jackrabbit:jackrabbit-webdav:2.0-beta4; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The reported native-image run failure is likely a metadata/runtime behavior issue rather than missing infrastructure setup, so this preparation may not by itself fix the failing tests.
The servlet API is old and provided-scoped in the upstream artifact; using newer jakarta.servlet imports would be incompatible with this library version.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: jackrabbit-webdav declares javax.servlet:servlet-api as a provided dependency, and key server/io WebDAV classes expose javax.servlet request/response types, so meaningful coverage of the servlet-facing API needs that API on the test compile classpath.
